name: Spoonflower Designer Marketplace
reason: Fabric/wallpaper/home decor marketplace where designers earn royalties (10–15%) on every sale of products featuring their uploaded patterns. Pure content-creation model — no affiliate component.
payoutModel: 10% base royalty on each sale (fabric, wallpaper, home decor); bonus tiers up to 15% based on monthly sales volume. Paid monthly via PayPal (min $10).

name: Amazon Merch on Demand
reason: Print-on-demand program where designers upload artwork and earn a royalty on every product sold on Amazon. Creators earn purely from their designs being sold — not an affiliate program.
payoutModel: Royalty per sale = sale price minus Amazon production cost & taxes. Tiered upload system (T10 → T500+). Typical royalty: ~$2–$10 per shirt depending on price point.

name: Displate Artist Marketplace
reason: Metal poster marketplace where artists upload designs and earn commissions on every sale. Creators earn 5–30% per poster sold; artwork is physically printed on metal by Displate.
payoutModel: 5–30% commission per sale depending on poster size/price. Paid via PayPal (min $15). Top creators earn $200–$5,000+/mo.

name: Creative Fabrica Designer Store
reason: SVG, craft, font, and digital asset marketplace where designers earn royalties both from direct sales (50–75%) and subscription revenue sharing. Pure design marketplace, not affiliate-based.
payoutModel: 75% royalty on self-referred sales; 50% on platform-referred sales. Subscription revenue share: 50% pooled and distributed by download count. Paid monthly (payout on demand, processed within 7 days).

name: CGTrader 3D Model Marketplace
reason: 3D model marketplace where designers sell game-ready models, characters, architectural assets, etc. and earn 60–85% royalties. Pure creator marketplace — earn from selling your own 3D work.
payoutModel: Tiered royalty system: new sellers keep 60% (40% fee); top-tier sellers earn up to 85%. Payouts via Hyperwallet (weekly or monthly, 20 days after each sale).

name: ArtStation Marketplace
reason: Game art and 3D asset marketplace (owned by Epic Games) where artists sell brushes, 3D models, tutorials, textures, and game-ready assets. Earn up to 95% on self-promoted sales — one of the highest-commission digital asset platforms.
payoutModel: 5% fee for Pro members (keep 95% on self-promoted sales); 12% fee for free members. Fixed $0.30 transaction fee per sale. Payouts weekly or monthly via direct bank deposit (min $25).

name: TurboSquid 3D Marketplace
reason: Largest dedicated 3D model marketplace where artists sell game assets, architectural models, vehicles, and more. Non-exclusive artists earn 40%; SquidGuild (exclusive) members earn 50–60%. Creators earn purely from their 3D work.
payoutModel: Non-exclusive: 40% royalty. SquidGuild exclusive: 50–60% based on lifetime sales (60% after $10K+ in sales). Monthly payouts (first business day of month).

name: Depositphotos Contributor
reason: Major stock photography marketplace with a tiered contributor program. Photographers earn royalties on every download — both subscription-based and on-demand. Pure content marketplace, no affiliate component.
payoutModel: Subscription downloads: $0.25–$0.33 per download (tiered by total downloads). On-demand/pack purchases: 30–38% of file price. Paid via PayPal, Payoneer, or Skrill (min $25).

name: Bigstock Photo Contributor
reason: Stock photography marketplace (Shutterstock subsidiary) with a tiered contributor royalty program. Photographers upload photos/vectors and earn per download based on customer plan and contributor tier.
payoutModel: Credit purchases: $0.50/credit spent. Subscription downloads: $0.25–$0.38 per download (tiered by annual download count). Extended license: $25. Paid monthly (min $25 balance).

name: 123RF Stock Contributor
reason: Large stock media marketplace (230M+ assets) where contributors sell photos, vectors, and 4K video footage. Earn royalties on every download. Active and growing contributor program in 2025–2026.
payoutModel: Tiered royalty: 30–60% depending on contributor level and purchase type (subscription vs. on-demand). Subscription royalties vary by download volume. Monthly payouts via PayPal or bank transfer.
